note: Embedded as inline DrawingML chart (c:chart) or extended chart (cx:chart) depending on chartType. Data via inline spec or per-series props. Mirrors pptx/chart surface. Axis configuration: chart-level axis* props (axismin, axismax, axistitle, axisfont, ...) are Add-time only; for post-creation axis Set/Get use the chart-axis element.

seriesCount.description: number of data series in the chart (extended cx:chart only).

valaxisvisible.description: convenience shortcut for /chart[N]/axis[@role=...] visible (on role=value); see chart-axis schema for full axis-level options

radarstyle.description: radar chart subtype. Values: standard|line, marker, filled|fill.

dispUnits.description: value-axis display units token readback (e.g. thousands, millions). Surfaces on the chart node when emitted by the value axis.
